title: Build binary in a docker container
body:
so that people don't need to install all dependencies just to build.

Make it so that "make binary" does nothing if nothing changed.

Also use ${DEST} in a few more spots for consistency

Signed-off-by: Doug Davis dug@us.ibm.com

comments.body: not sure why tests failing - docker isn't running ...
I think its because we're now calling docker from a container - trying to fix...
Fixed but I'm not sure its the right solution.
I'd say this is good to go, @duglin care to rebase? I'll merge after
